title: Feedback-Schema härten
goal: policy.feedback.schema.json von einem inhaltsleeren object-Schema zu einem konkret validierenden Contract mit Positiv- und Negativ-Fixtures härten.

acceptance.assertion: policy.feedback.schema.json definiert die real produzierten Felder und required-Felder explizit.
data/samples/policy.feedback.sample.json validiert weiter grün gegen das gehärtete Schema.
Ein invalides Feedback-Fixture wird durch validate_json.py oder den CI-äquivalenten Validator abgelehnt.
Der Diff enthält keine Feedback-Kern-Refactors und keine additive-bezogene Contract-Änderung.

metadata.outcome: Heimlern PR #183 hardened policy.feedback.schema.json with positive and rejected fixtures.

verified_acceptance.feedback-schema-concrete: contracts/policy.feedback.schema.json now defines required feedback_id, decision_id and reward plus explicit properties and additionalProperties=false
verified_acceptance.positive-fixture-valid: data/samples/policy.feedback.sample.json validates against the hardened schema
verified_acceptance.negative-fixture-rejected: data/samples/policy.feedback.rejected.json is rejected by scripts/validate_json.py and enforced in rust.yml schema-validate
verified_acceptance.no-refactor-mixed-in: heimlern diff limited to .github/workflows/rust.yml, contracts/policy.feedback.schema.json and data/samples/policy.feedback.rejected.json

checks: local rejected fixture returned failure as expected
